overview: Vidyamandir is a bilingual (English & Bengali) e-commerce bookshop for a local store in Purba Bardhaman, West Bengal. It features a full Flipkart/Amazon-style shopping experience with flash sales, cart/wishlist, order tracking, reviews, Q&A, admin analytics, promo codes, returns/refunds, Stripe payments, real email and SMS notifications, and a premium dark navy and orange editorial UI.
features: Real email notifications via Resend API
SMS alerts via Twilio for orders and returns
